cryptobert.notes: Split out from aggregate sentiment voter 2026-05-15. CryptoBERT sub-model previously hidden inside the 46% aggregate; per-model accuracy never measured. Fan-out call site: portfolio/sentiment.py. Crypto tickers only (BTC/ETH).

trading_hero.notes: Split out from aggregate sentiment voter 2026-05-15. Trading-Hero-LLM sub-model previously hidden inside the 46% aggregate. Stock tickers only (MSTR + future tier-1 stocks).

sentiment_legacy_ensemble.notes: Historical aggregate of CryptoBERT/FinBERT/Trading-Hero/FinGPT scores. Disabled at 46% on 40K samples 2026-05-03. Kept as a registry-tracked baseline so the four split sub-voters (cryptobert/finbert/trading_hero/fingpt) can be compared against the ensemble they replaced. Vote remains force-HOLD via DISABLED_SIGNALS — this entry exists for telemetry parity, not promotion.

forecast.notes: Re-registered as shadow 2026-05-15 after 2026-05-12 disable (25.6% recent 1d, 6966 samples all-time at 47%). Chronos-2 time-series foundation model failing in ranging regime. Vote remains force-HOLD via DISABLED_SIGNALS; this entry tracks recovery via fresh shadow data. Run cost: ~3s/cycle on GPU — cycle_modulo=3 to keep loop near 60s.

claude_fundamental.notes: Re-registered as shadow 2026-05-15 after 2026-05-03 disable (19.8% recent 1d, 222 samples, structural BUY bias on Opus tier). Vote remains force-HOLD via DISABLED_SIGNALS; this entry tracks any recovery after the bias-detector fix. Run cost: ~5s/cycle (Claude CLI subprocess cascade) — cycle_modulo=5 to protect cycle time.

finance_llama.notes: Scaffold registered 2026-05-15. Model: Q:/models/finance-llama-8b-gguf/wiroai-finance-llama-8b-q4_k_m.gguf (4.6GB GGUF). Wrapper at portfolio/signals/finance_llama.py returns HOLD with feature_unavailable=True until inference (llama-server prompt + token-logprob extraction) is implemented and verified. Cycle cost target: ~4s on GPU — cycle_modulo=3 once inference is live. [2026-05-17 verify: bumped cycle_modulo 3->1 temporarily to validate end-to-end emission in production; restore to 3 once mean_conf>0 verified to keep cycle budget bounded]

cryptotrader_lm.notes: Scaffold registered 2026-05-15. Model: Q:/models/cryptotrader-lm/ (PEFT LoRA on Ministral-8B base + GGUF copy). Crypto-only (BTC/ETH). Wrapper at portfolio/signals/cryptotrader_lm.py returns HOLD with feature_unavailable=True until LoRA loader is implemented. Higher promotion bar (0.60) because the published model card claims 72% accuracy and 0.94 Sharpe — if it can't clear 60% live we want to know fast.

meta_trader.notes: Scaffold registered 2026-05-15. Model: Q:/models/custom-meta-trader/ (Qwen2-36L unsloth safetensors, 5.8GB, 32K context). Wrapper at portfolio/signals/meta_trader.py returns HOLD with feature_unavailable=True. Designed to consume other LLM voter outputs from the same cycle as features (meta-model role), so it must be invoked AFTER ministral/qwen3 in the dispatch order. cycle_modulo=5 because Qwen2-36L inference is the most expensive in our stack.
